arts.sum: Arsenal are allegedly giving consideration to making an approach for one of Newcastle United's star players during the summer transfer window.

arts.sum: The holders require another special night to reach the Champions League semi-final

arts.ttl: Manchester United plan to ‘hijack’ Arsenal transfer bid
arts.sum: Manchester United are planning to hijack Arsenal’s bid to sign Espanyol goalkeeper Joan Garcia. The unconvincing performances of Andre Onana and Altay Bayindir have persuaded Manchester United to assess the market for potential goalkeepers this summer. Onana was dropped for Sunday’s 4-1 defeat at Newcastle after two errors in the draw at Lyon last week. […] The post Manchester United plan to ‘hijack’ Arsenal transfer bid first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid expected team vs Arsenal with no Modric in triple Ancelotti change
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti is expected to switch things about as he looks to mastermind yet another Real Madrid Champions League comeback. Real Madrid predicted team vs Arsenal: Courtois; Vazquez, Asencio, Rudiger, Garcia; Valverde, Tchouameni; Rodrygo, Bellingham, Vinicius Jr; Mbappe.

arts.ttl: ‘I left Arsenal for La Liga giants - William Saliba needs to know the grass isn’t greener’

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal: The greatest Champions League comebacks EVER as Carlo Ancelotti's side bid to overcome three-goal deficit
arts.sum: Real Madrid can take inspiration from previous against the odds victories in the tournament showing that a 3-0 first leg loss doesn't necessarily mean you're down and out.
